summary.en: OCPP is the global open communication protocol between charging stations and charging management systems. Open Charge Alliance lists OCPP 1.6, OCPP 2.0.1, and OCPP 2.1 as available versions; OCPP 2.0.1 edition 3 was approved as IEC 63584 in 2024, and OCPP 2.1 was released in 2025. Turkey projects may require OCPP through operator backend, EPDK automation, tender, roaming, payment, or maintenance specifications even when OCPP is not the whole-unit product approval route.
summary.zh: OCPP是充电站与充电管理系统之间的全球开放通信协议。Open Charge Alliance列明可用版本包括OCPP 1.6、OCPP 2.0.1和OCPP 2.1；OCPP 2.0.1第3版于2024年获批为IEC 63584，OCPP 2.1于2025年发布。即使OCPP不是整机产品批准路径，土耳其项目也可能通过运营商后台、EPDK自动化、招标、漫游、支付或维护规范要求OCPP。
summary.zht: OCPP是充電站與充電管理系統之間的全球開放通訊協議。Open Charge Alliance列明可用版本包括OCPP 1.6、OCPP 2.0.1和OCPP 2.1；OCPP 2.0.1第3版於2024年獲批為IEC 63584，OCPP 2.1於2025年發布。即使OCPP不是整機產品批准路徑，土耳其項目也可能通過營運商後台、EPDK自動化、招標、漫遊、支付或維護規範要求OCPP。

summary.en: GB-standard cn_common_equivalent: China-market DC chargers commonly rely on GB/T 27930 for charger-to-vehicle battery-management communication. That protocol is not an operator backend protocol and does not replace OCPP implementation, cybersecurity profiles, backend acceptance testing, remote firmware update procedures, or operator data interfaces.
summary.zh: GB标准中国常见对应：中国市场直流充电机通常依赖GB/T 27930进行充电机与车辆电池管理系统通信。该协议不是运营商后台协议，不能替代OCPP实现、网络安全配置、后台验收测试、远程固件更新程序或运营商数据接口。
summary.zht: GB標準中國常見對應：中國市場直流充電機通常依賴GB/T 27930進行充電機與車輛電池管理系統通訊。該協議不是營運商後台協議，不能替代OCPP實現、網路安全配置、後台驗收測試、遠端韌體更新程序或營運商資料接口。

gap.en: The Turkey project file should identify the exact OCPP version, security profile, certificate handling, meter-value mapping, transaction model, remote reset and firmware process, SIM or Ethernet architecture, Turkish operator backend endpoint, and test evidence from the target charging management system.
gap.zh: 土耳其项目文件应明确OCPP具体版本、安全配置、证书处理、计量值映射、交易模型、远程复位和固件流程、SIM或以太网架构、土耳其运营商后台端点，以及来自目标充电管理系统的测试证据。
gap.zht: 土耳其項目文件應明確OCPP具體版本、安全配置、證書處理、計量值映射、交易模型、遠端復位和韌體流程、SIM或乙太網架構、土耳其營運商後台端點，以及來自目標充電管理系統的測試證據。

mandatory_status.target: Usually mandatory when required by the operator, tender, EPDK automation integration, roaming, payment, or maintenance specification; OCPP is not by itself a whole-unit safety certification
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is vehicle-side DC charging communication and does not satisfy backend OCPP requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm OCPP version and security profile with the Turkish operator before shipment. GB/T 27930 support does not prove backend interoperability with an EPDK-facing or operator-facing charging management system.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出货前应与土耳其运营商确认OCPP版本和安全配置。支持GB/T 27930并不能证明可与面向EPDK或运营商的充电管理系统后台互操作。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出貨前應與土耳其營運商確認OCPP版本和安全配置。支持GB/T 27930並不能證明可與面向EPDK或營運商的充電管理系統後台互操作。
